title: UniLab Runtime Contract Map
subtitle: CPU Physics -> Collector/IPC -> GPU Learner boundary map for UniLab.

nodes.title: unilab CLI chooses route
nodes.output: 具体训练脚本、config group、task owner YAML、生成的 Hydra overrides、运行 Python。
nodes.forbidden: 不能让 algo/task/sim 这种路由字段从任意 passthrough override 偷偷改写。
nodes.diagnostic: CLI 参数校验、entrypoint script exists、owner YAML exists、Motrix/MLX runtime requirement check。

children.title: training script assembles run
children.output: env cfg override、runner kwargs、log root、experiment tracker、playback plan。
children.forbidden: scripts/ 不承载长期业务规则；不能绕过 registry 或 backend contract 直接依赖具体后端实现。
children.diagnostic: resolved config、log dir、resume path、playback messages、failure summary。

children.title: Hydra resolves algorithm config
children.role: 算法与训练默认值所有者。
children.forbidden: 不能在 task owner 外隐式选择不匹配的 backend/task variant。
children.diagnostic: OmegaConf resolved cfg、reserved override guard、offpolicy task-choice assertion。

children.title: Task owner YAML selects env/backend
children.forbidden: 不能把 backend 切换散落到脚本条件分支；同一 task 的 mujoco/motrix 差异应由 owner config 表达。
children.diagnostic: owner YAML path check、support matrix/docs、config review。

children.title: registry.make constructs environment
children.output: 实现 ABEnv/NpEnv contract 的具体环境实例。
children.forbidden: 算法和脚本不能直接 import 某个任务类来绕开注册表。
children.diagnostic: unknown task/backend errors、available backend listing、dataclass field validation。

children.title: SimBackend normalizes physics
children.output: 统一的 model/state/step/body ids/control range/DR/playback capabilities。
children.forbidden: env 以上的层不能依赖 mujoco/motrix 私有状态布局。
children.diagnostic: backend capability methods、render plan、state shape checks、backend-specific tests。

children.title: MuJoCo backend
children.output: 满足 SimBackend 的 MuJoCo state stepping and playback。
children.forbidden: 不能把 MuJoCo-only API 泄漏到算法 runner。
children.diagnostic: MuJoCo backend smoke tests、benchmark_mujoco_*、backend support docs。

children.title: Motrix backend
children.output: 满足 SimBackend 的 Motrix state stepping and native playback。
children.forbidden: 不能要求非 Motrix 路径具备 native renderer。
children.diagnostic: Motrix import/runtime checks、mxpython routing、record/interactive playback plan。

children.title: Robot task env owns rewards and observations
children.forbidden: 后端只负责物理 contract；不能拥有任务 reward 或 policy observation 语义。
children.diagnostic: obs group spec、reward logs、domain randomization payloads、task tests。

children.title: Algorithm runtime builds learner/runner
children.forbidden: 算法不能重新定义 env reset/step/obs contract；只能消费 registry/env 暴露出的规范接口。
children.diagnostic: runner kwargs、model dim guard、checkpoint load status、learner metrics。

children.title: AsyncRunner starts CPU collectors
children.input: env name、env cfg overrides、collector device、sim backend、num_envs、stop event。
children.forbidden: 不能让 collector 异常静默死亡；不能遗留 shared memory/resource。

children.title: Replay transport bridges CPU physics to GPU learner
children.output: shared replay buffer、rollout ring、weight sync、learner minibatches。
children.forbidden: 不能在传输层改变 reward/obs 语义；只能移动和同步数据。
children.diagnostic: memory budget, IPC benchmarks, shared buffer layout tests, transfer backend metrics。

children.title: Learner updates policy on accelerator
children.input: minibatches or rollouts、actor/critic networks、optimizer config、mixed precision/compile flags。
children.output: updated policy weights、checkpoint、training metrics、new weights for collectors。
children.forbidden: 不能直接控制 backend state；对环境的唯一交互应经 runner/collector contract。

children.title: Playback, docs, tests, benchmarks prove contract
children.input: trained checkpoints、run logs、backend playback plan、tests/benchmarks/docs ADR。
children.output: interactive/recorded playback、support matrix、CI signal、performance profiles、architecture decisions。
children.forbidden: 不能用一次 smoke run 代替 contract 测试；不能让文档与 owner config 支持矩阵分叉。
children.diagnostic: tests/, benchmark/, docs/sphinx/source/adr, generated backend support docs, demo commands。
